---
title: "Ellen Foster"
---

## Ellen Foster

**Dates:** (Somerset 1841-?1889)

### Description

ladies maid to Gertrude Walter

### Biography

1881 census, birth and death registers

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 27th 1889
- Letter from Aug 25 [1883]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
